历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science (physics category) was approximately 3083 → 4129 → 6076 → 6015 → 6939, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 3856 positions over the past 5 years; the 2025 baseline is about 6939, a backward shift of about 924 positions compared to 2024, with a significantly increased magnitude; the enrollment plan for this university in Shanxi Province for science (physics category) is: 25 in 2021, 24 in 2022, 24 in 2023, 25 in 2024, 29 in 2025, and 28 in 2026; in 2026, there is a reduction of 1 student compared to 2025, a slight tightening.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 35th in the Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking (2026), with a stable ranking in the 33–35 range in recent years, belonging to the top national finance and economics institutions; no significant negative or positive events appeared in the reputation evaluation documents from 2021 to 2026, with a stable reputation; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 99th (rated as 'average'), with general exposure on short video platforms, and no signs of abnormal increase in application attention; no record of gaps in the admission file; Business Administration A+, Applied Economics A+, Theoretical Economics A, Statistics A-, with top national strength in finance and economics disciplines; the enrollment majors cover Finance, Accounting, Economics, Statistics, etc., highly matching the advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the popularity of Finance/Economics majors was assessed as 'divergent and wait-and-see', with a slight increase compared to 2023; Accounting/Finance/Auditing majors were assessed as 'recommended'; in 2026, there are 167,419 physics category candidates in Shanxi Province, a decrease of about 3.4% compared to 173,347 in 2025, with a slight easing of competition; Shanghai University of Finance and Economics is located in Shanghai, not the home province of Shanxi; the proportion of enrollment in Shanxi is about 2.8%–3.4% (46 out of 1633 in 2025), with a stable enrollment scale and no obvious regional preference changes.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend in recent years, the slight reduction in the 2026 plan (1 student), and the slight decrease in physics category candidates (about 3.4%), but against the background of the continuous backward trend in recent years and the divergent wait-and-see popularity of finance and economics majors, it is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will fluctuate slightly around the 2025 baseline. The predicted minimum ranking is about 6825, with a range of 6325–7325.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts (history category) was approximately 458 → 2157 → 895 → 693 → 681. An abnormally high ranking (2157) occurred in 2022 but quickly returned to normal, stabilizing in the 681–895 range over the past three years. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 681. The enrollment plan for this university in Shanxi Province's liberal arts (history category) is: 15 in 2021, 16 in 2022, 16 in 2023, 16 in 2024, 17 in 2025, and 16 in 2026. Compared to 2025, there is a slight reduction of 1 student in 2026, indicating a minor tightening.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 35th on the Soft Science China University Main Ranking (2026), with a stable ranking in the 33–35 range in recent years, making it a top national finance and economics institution. In the reputation evaluation documents from 2021 to 2026, no significant negative or positive events were recorded, indicating a stable reputation. Its comprehensive popularity ranking on Douyin is 99th (rated as 'average'), with moderate exposure on short video platforms. No records of enrollment gaps were found in the abnormal enrollment documents. It holds A+ in Business Administration, A+ in Applied Economics, A in Theoretical Economics, and A- in Statistics, demonstrating top-tier strength in finance and economics disciplines. The liberal arts enrollment covers majors such as Accounting, Finance, Law, Financial Management, and Auditing, which are highly aligned with its advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the popularity of finance/economics/economy majors was assessed as 'differentiated wait-and-see,' with a slight increase compared to 2023. Accounting/finance/auditing majors were assessed as 'recommended.' In 2026, the number of history category examinees in Shanxi Province is 63,113, a decrease of approximately 25.6% from 84,879 in 2025, significantly easing competition. Shanghai University of Finance and Economics is located in Shanghai, not in Shanxi Province. Its enrollment proportion in Shanxi is approximately 2.8%–3.4%, with a stable enrollment scale and no significant regional preference changes.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the stable rankings over the past three years, the slight reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan (1 student), and the significant decrease in history category examinees (approximately 25.6%), the drop in the number of examinees is the main factor affecting competition intensity. It is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will slightly improve compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 637, with a range of 541–733.
